page.title: Category:Article message templates with missing parameters

[[Category:Article message templates]]

[[Category:Article message templates]]
[[uk:Категорія:Шаблони-повідомлення для статей з відсутніми параметрами]] [[ur:زمرہ:مضمون پیامی سانچے بمعہ غیر موجود محددات]] [[zh:Category:缺少參數的條目訊息模板]]

revision.comment: [[User:Addbot|Bot:]] Migrating 3 interwiki links, now provided by [[Wikipedia:Wikidata|Wikidata]] on [[d:q7069415]]
revision.text: [[Category:Article message templates]]

revision.comment: +template category
revision.text: {{template category}} [[Category:Article message templates]]

revision.comment: ce, add hidden cat
unhide: pls do not hide any category except for very good reasons; people should be able to find pages such as this one; (hidden cats are mainly for maintenance cats on mainspace articles)
rm misplaced edit summary
+Category used by module
add a description so people know how to actually fix this
using CatAutoTOC for dynamic sizing
13 revisions imported from [[:wikipedia:Category:Article_message_templates_with_missing_parameters]]
[[WP:SORTKEY]]
14 revisions imported
Copying from [[Category:Pages from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia]] to [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Pages and Categories from wikipedia2]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:Improperly tagged templates and modules]] to [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] on using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Removing from [[Category:Articles tagged as templates and modules]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Copying from [[Category:List of Shikinaisha]] to [[Category:qq]][[sn:{{subst:PAGENAME}}]][[Category:qq]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
Text replacement - "qq" to "11"
Bot: Reformatted page - moved categories, interwikis, DEFAULTSORT, and removed duplicates. [[{page.name}]]
Bot: tidy & size tag (26 members)
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
